name: Vegan Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 medium potato, peeled and coarsely diced
1/2 medium carrot, scraped and thickly sliced
1/2 med onion, peeled and coarsely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a small saucepan, bring potato, carrot, onion, 1 cup water, and salt to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Lower heat to medium, cover, and simmer until potato and carrot are tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, thaw frozen broccoli in a colander under hot running water, then set aside and drain well.
5. When the potato mixture has finished simmering, pour into a blender and add tofu, yeast, lemon juice, and garlic. Blend until very smooth and creamy.
6. Pour contents into a greased 1 1/2 to 2 quart casserole dish. Add broccoli, rice, mushrooms, and 3/4 cup water. Stir well and smooth the top of the casserole.
7. Bake for 40 minutes, or until golden and bubbling. Serves 4.
Substitution: Instead of frozen broccoli, you can use 1 lb fresh broccoli (tops only), chopped and steamed briefly until crisp-tender, then cooled under cold running water and drained thoroughly.
